channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Breaking Down Barriers: How CIOs Can Support Justice-Impacted Individuals in Tech
item.description: Discover how CIOs can make a positive impact on society by supporting justice-impacted individuals and providing them with skills and opportunities to succeed.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title:
**: "Jeff Bezos to Meet with President-elect Trump Amid Growing Tech Influence" * ****: "Amazon founder Jeff Bezos to meet with president-elect Trump, sparking speculation about potential inroads between tech leaders and the administration"

item.title: Microsoft Ignite Conference: Azure Confidential Computing Features
item.description: Discover Microsoft's latest features and technologies presented at its Ignite conference, focusing on Azure Confidential Computing for improved security and scalability.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
